title: RawInput Mod(鼠标原始输入)
description: I added raw mouse input for Minecraft
body:
RawInput – Smoother Mouse Input for Minecraft

Description:
Vanilla Minecraft (especially older versions like 1.12 and below) can experience input lag or stuttering when using high-DPI or high-performance mice on Windows. RawInput fixes this by using Minecraft’s built-in JInput system to read raw mouse input, providing smoother and more responsive camera movement.

Features:

Replaces standard Windows mouse input with raw input via JInput

Reduces stutter and lag for high-performance mice

Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.8.9、1.7.10、1.6.4、1.5.2、1.5.1、1.4.7、1.4.6、1.4.5

# RawInput Mod in 1.7.10 requires the [UniMixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins) mod

# The RawInput Mod for 1.8.9 is not compatible with _LiteLoader_

Why Download:
If your Minecraft camera feels jittery or unresponsive with modern mice, RawInput makes your gameplay feel smoother and more natural.
